title: Production Storyboards
description: Four independent 16:9 storyboard sheets testing commercial mockup, material physics, camera blocking, and technical production layout.
creative_direction: Independent storyboard studies: each board uses a different production context but keeps six-panel shot clarity, pencil handoff language, camera arrows, and readable visual hierarchy without reference dependencies.

en.title: Production Storyboards
en.description: Four independent 16:9 storyboard sheets testing commercial mockup, material physics, camera blocking, and technical production layout.

zh-CN.title: 制作分镜单图
zh-CN.description: 四张独立 16:9 分镜板,测试广告样机、材质物理、镜头调度和技术制作版式。
